Title: Technijian VDI Tenant Setup
Description: Provision the Technijian VDI tenant for AFFG within the Technijian private cloud. Configure the VDI workspace, host pool (personal desktop assignment model), session host VM sizing template (4 vCore / 16 GB RAM / 100 GB storage), and diagnostic settings. Verify resource allocation and datacenter placement (Technijian US West) to support AFFG's Irvine-based agent population with minimal latency to Schwab and Interactive Brokers APIs.

Title: Deploy 11 Windows 11 Personal Desktop Images
Description: Deploy 11 dedicated Windows 11 Enterprise Personal Desktop virtual machines — one per AFFG agent. Apply the Technijian gold image including Office 365 apps, Edge/Chrome browsers, and baseline performance tuning. Each VM is a dedicated personal desktop (not pooled/multi-session) to ensure FINRA 3110 individual accountability and SEC Reg S-P data isolation requirements are met.

Title: Configure VDI Security Policies
Description: Configure VDI session controls per the AFFG IT Compliance Strategy: disable clipboard redirection to local device, disable local drive mapping, disable USB/external storage redirection, disable print-to-local (or enable with audit), enable watermarking for screen-capture deterrence, and enforce 15-minute session auto-lock on inactivity. These controls enforce the "no client data on personal device" core design principle.

Title: User Profile Management & FSLogix Setup
Description: Deploy and configure FSLogix profile containers for each of the 11 AFFG users. Configure the container storage path pointing to the Technijian Production Storage pool (shared). Set profile inclusion/exclusion policies, size limits, and redirection rules for Outlook caches, Teams caches, and OneDrive Files On-Demand. Validate that profiles persist correctly across sign-in/sign-out cycles.

Title: MFA & Entra Conditional Access Configuration
Description: Enable Multi-Factor Authentication for all 11 AFFG VDI users via Microsoft Authenticator. Configure Entra ID Conditional Access policies to require MFA for VDI sign-in and to restrict M365 access to VDI-sourced sessions only. Test MFA challenge flows and document the break-glass recovery procedure.

Title: User Enrollment & VDI Access Training
Description: Enroll each of the 11 AFFG agents in the VDI environment. Provide hands-on training sessions covering VDI sign-in, MFA, how Schwab and IBKR behave inside the VDI (vs. local), clipboard/download limitations, proper sign-out procedures, and what to do when a session drops. Produce a short quick-reference guide that AFFG can distribute internally.

Title: My Audit UAM+DLP Integration with VDI
Description: Install and configure the My Audit UAM+DLP agent inside each of the 11 VDI desktops. Verify that screen recording, keystroke logging, application monitoring, and DLP policies are capturing correctly. Validate that the 1-year retention policy is enabled and that logs write to the designated immutable storage bucket.

Title: VDI Network Egress IP Configuration
Description: Configure and document the VDI environment's static egress IP addresses (primary + secondary for HA). These IPs will be provided to Schwab and Interactive Brokers for IP allowlisting. Verify outbound connectivity from VDI reaches Schwab Advisor Services (advisorservices.schwab.com) and Interactive Brokers (ndcdyn.interactivebrokers.com) correctly.

Title: Entra Conditional Access – VDI-only M365 Sign-ins
Description: Refine Entra ID Conditional Access policies so M365 sign-ins (Exchange Online, SharePoint, Teams, OneDrive) are only permitted from the VDI egress IPs plus any AFFG registered principal named-exception device. Apply to all 31 AFFG M365 users. Test sign-in blocking from non-VDI source IPs and document the exception process.

Title: Schwab IP Allowlist Request Processing
Description: Prepare and submit the Schwab Advisor Services IP allowlist request using AFFG's VDI egress IPs. Track the request through Schwab's approval process, coordinate any required AFFG signatures, and validate that Schwab login is restricted to the VDI egress after allowlist activation.

Title: Interactive Brokers IP Allowlist Setup
Description: Configure Interactive Brokers IP allowlisting to restrict TWS / IBKR Mobile / Web access to AFFG's VDI egress IPs. Work with AFFG's Interactive Brokers relationship manager to apply the restriction at the account level. Verify login blocking from non-VDI source IPs.

Title: Block Legacy Authentication in Entra ID
Description: Disable legacy authentication protocols (IMAP, POP3, Exchange ActiveSync, SMTP AUTH, legacy SharePoint auth) in Entra ID. Audit AFFG's M365 sign-in logs for any legacy-auth usage before blocking and remediate any dependent apps. Document the block and exception process.

Title: Endpoint Protection Deployment on VDI (CrowdStrike + Huntress)
Description: Deploy CrowdStrike Falcon EDR and Huntress Managed Detection agents inside each of the 11 VDI desktops. Configure detection policies, response actions, and forwarding to Technijian SOC. Verify agent check-in, test with an EICAR file, and confirm Huntress 24/7 monitoring coverage is active for AFFG.

Title: M365 DLP Policies for PII / SSN / Account Numbers
Description: Configure Microsoft 365 Data Loss Prevention policies to detect and block exfiltration of Social Security Numbers, Schwab/IBKR account numbers, bank routing numbers, and other financial Sensitive Information Types across Exchange Online, SharePoint, OneDrive, and Teams. Define block, warn, and audit actions by destination. Exclude approved business exceptions.

Title: OneDrive External Sharing Restrictions
Description: Lock down OneDrive and SharePoint external sharing. Configure allow-list for authorized external partners (e.g., Schwab, custodians), block anonymous sharing, enforce link expiration, and require sign-in for all external access. Document the AFFG-approved sharing exception process.

Title: Email DLP Rules Configuration
Description: Build Exchange Online mail-flow rules to prevent client PII from being sent to personal email addresses or external non-whitelisted domains. Configure header-based routing, TLS enforcement for known custodian domains, and encryption on outbound mail containing financial SITs. Produce the DLP policy map for regulator-ready documentation.

Title: Sensitive Information Types (SITs) Setup
Description: Define the custom M365 Sensitive Information Types matching AFFG's specific data patterns: Schwab account number format, IBKR account format, internal AFFG account IDs, and any custodian-specific tokens. Validate detection accuracy using sample non-production data.

Title: DLP Testing & Validation
Description: End-to-end test of the DLP deployment. Attempt exfiltration via email, OneDrive external share, Teams chat, and USB (VDI block). Confirm all scenarios are blocked or quarantined with alerts routed to Technijian SOC. Produce the DLP validation report for AFFG registered principal sign-off.

Title: Veeam 365 Backup Deployment
Description: Deploy and configure Veeam 365 Backup against AFFG's Microsoft 365 tenant. Back up Exchange Online mailboxes, SharePoint sites, OneDrive accounts, and Teams data for all 31 users. Configure backup schedules (daily incremental, weekly full) and initial seed backup.

Title: Configure 7-Year Retention + Immutability
Description: Configure Veeam 365 retention to 7 years with immutability (WORM) on the Backup Storage tier. Verify that deletion operations against immutable backups are rejected during the retention window. Document the retention policy for SEC 17a-4 regulator inquiries.

Title: eDiscovery Workspace Setup
Description: Configure the M365 Compliance Center eDiscovery (Standard) workspace with AFFG's registered principal as the primary eDiscovery manager. Validate that cases can be opened, custodians placed on hold, and data exported. Produce the eDiscovery runbook for AFFG compliance staff.

Title: Coordinate with AFFG's Existing Email Archive
Description: Coordinate with AFFG's existing email archiving vendor/platform to confirm continuity of 7-year SEC 17a-4 compliant mail archival. Document which system is authoritative for long-term retention, how journaling is configured, and handoff procedures if AFFG ever elects to switch providers in the future.

Title: My Audit UAM+DLP Agent Deployment
Description: Confirm the UAM+DLP agent deployed in Phase 1 is operating on all 11 VDI desktops with full policy application. Fine-tune detection sensitivity for AFFG's workflow (reduce false positives from legitimate Schwab/IBKR activity). Validate 1-year data retention path and immutability.

Title: Configure VDI Session Logging
Description: Enable detailed session logging on the Technijian VDI host pool: sign-in, sign-out, reconnect events, session duration, source IP, and MFA method. Forward logs to Technijian's central log store. Retain per SEC 17a-4 requirements.

Title: Insider Threat & Anomaly Alerting
Description: Build detection rules for anomalous user behavior: off-hours sign-ins, impossible travel, unusual data access volumes, mass deletion attempts, and after-hours DLP violations. Configure alert routing to Technijian SOC with AFFG principal as secondary notification.

Title: Build Compliance Dashboard
Description: Build the monthly compliance dashboard aggregating: MFA enforcement rate, DLP events by severity, VDI uptime and session counts, My Audit coverage, backup success rate, pen-test findings status, and phishing simulation completion. Deliver as a recurring PDF report for AFFG's registered principal.

Title: Supervisory Audit Trail (FINRA 3110) Configuration
Description: Configure the supervisory audit trail to meet FINRA Rule 3110 requirements: per-agent activity logs, timestamped with named accounts (no shared credentials), immutable for retention period. Ensure each agent's activity is individually attributable via the dedicated-VM model. Deliver the supervisory trail architecture document.

Title: Penetration Test of VDI Environment
Description: Perform a penetration test of the VDI environment covering: external attack surface, VDI egress/ingress controls, clipboard/drive/USB bypass attempts, cross-VM isolation, session takeover attempts, and privilege escalation within a Win11 VDI. Produce formal pen test report with findings and remediation plan.

Title: Huntress SAT Deployment (Security Awareness Training)
Description: Deploy Huntress SAT to AFFG's 31 M365 users. Configure training assignments, simulated phishing campaigns (monthly cadence), and enrollment tracking. Customize training modules to include FINRA/SEC-specific scenarios: customer PII exposure, impersonation of registered principals, Schwab/IBKR credential phishing.

Title: Phishing Simulation Setup & Baseline
Description: Launch the first simulated phishing campaign to establish AFFG's baseline click/report rates. Configure monthly follow-up simulations with escalating difficulty. Define completion thresholds and remediation training assignments for users who fail.

Title: Post-Implementation Compliance Gap Assessment
Description: Conduct post-implementation gap assessment against the AFFG IT Compliance Strategy requirements: SEC Reg S-P (10 requirements), FINRA Rule 4370 (2 controls), FINRA Rule 3110 (3 supervisory provisions), SEC Rule 17a-4 (3 recordkeeping requirements). Document any residual gaps and remediation ownership.

Title: Written Incident Response Plan (IRP)
Description: Draft the AFFG-specific Written Incident Response Plan covering detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident review. Include roles and responsibilities for AFFG's registered principal, Technijian SOC, and external counsel. Include tabletop exercise template and annual review cadence.

Title: Breach Notification Procedures & Templates
Description: Build breach notification procedures meeting SEC Reg S-P 30-day customer notification requirement, state AG notifications (including California Civil Code 1798.82), FINRA notification triggers, and custodian notifications (Schwab, IBKR). Include pre-drafted notification templates for each recipient class.

Title: Service Provider Oversight Policy (72-hour clause)
Description: Draft the Service Provider Oversight Policy covering the SEC Reg S-P 72-hour vendor incident notification requirement, vendor due diligence procedures, vendor security attestations (SOC 2, ISO 27001), contract clause library, and annual vendor review cadence.

Title: BCP Customer Disclosure + Info Disposal
Description: Draft the Business Continuity Plan customer disclosure document (FINRA Rule 4370) and the Customer Information Disposal Policy (secure destruction of physical and digital PII). Align both with AFFG's Sophos firewall BCP from SOW-AFFG-001. Include the 72-hour vendor incident notification chain and cross-reference with the Service Provider Oversight Policy.

Title: Annual Sign-off & Policy Documentation Process
Description: Build the annual compliance sign-off process: principal attestation, Technijian audit evidence package, gap assessment refresh, and training completion roll-up. Deliver the compliance binder structure AFFG can present during a FINRA/SEC exam.

Title: Final Compliance Document Packaging & Delivery
Description: Final packaging of all compliance deliverables into AFFG's regulator-ready binder: IRP, breach notification procedures, vendor oversight policy, BCP disclosure, info disposal policy, annual sign-off template, compliance dashboard sample, pen test report, gap assessment, and supervisory audit trail architecture. Deliver as encrypted PDF bundle.
